---
ID: US-SLD-022
Title: Inline Text Editing and Style Toolbar
Status: Missing
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-24
---

As a slide editor user
I want to edit text directly on canvas with synchronized style controls
So copy and typography updates do not require raw JSON edits

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Text-capable components support inline edit mode with predictable enter/exit behavior.
- [ ] Style controls show selected element style and update live for supported properties.
- [ ] Font size enforces minimum 14px in UI and saved component state.
- [ ] Style apply flow is reliable when focus transitions between canvas and toolbar controls.
